title: Bestial Hide
description: The character's skin thickens into a tough, leathery or chitinous covering.
effect: Gains Natural Armour (2) to all locations.

title: Brute
description: The character's muscles swell and harden grotesquely.
effect: +10 Strength, -10 Agility.

title: Corrupted Flesh
description: The character's flesh becomes unnaturally resilient to harm.
effect: Gains the Regeneration (1) trait.

title: Deformed
description: Limbs twist, bones distort, and the body becomes visibly warped.
effect: -20 Fellowship. Movement reduced by 1.

title: Disturbing Voice
description: The character's voice becomes eerie, multilayered, or inhuman.
effect: +10 Intimidate, -10 Fellowship for all other social tests.

title: Extra Appendage
description: A vestigial limb, tail, or tentacle sprouts from the body.
effect: Gains an additional limb. May be used for a Basic melee attack (1d5+SB Impact).

title: Grotesque
description: The character becomes hideously ugly beyond normal human variation.
effect: -20 Fellowship. Causes Fear (1) in NPCs.

title: Horns
description: Bony protrusions or horns emerge from the skull.
effect: Gains a natural melee weapon (1d10+SB Impact). May headbutt in melee.

title: Malformed Hands
description: Fingers fuse, split, or warp into claws.
effect: -10 to tests requiring fine manipulation. Natural weapon: 1d5+SB Rending.

title: Misshapen
description: The character's body is asymmetrical and distorted, but tough.
effect: +5 Toughness. Does not fit standard armour (must be custom-made).

title: Nightsider
description: The character's eyes adapt to darkness but become photosensitive.
effect: Gains Dark Sight trait. -10 to Perception tests in bright light.

title: Razor Claws
description: Nails harden and extend into wicked natural weapons.
effect: Natural weapon: 1d10+SB Rending. Cannot wear standard gloves.

title: Scales
description: Reptilian or fishlike scales cover portions of the body.
effect: Gains Natural Armour (1) to all locations. -5 Fellowship.

title: Tail
description: A muscular or prehensile tail grows from the base of the spine.
effect: +10 to Acrobatics (Balance). May hold (but not wield) light items.

title: Toxic Blood
description: The character's blood becomes corrosive or poisonous.
effect: Anyone wounding the character in melee must pass Toughness test or take 1d5 Toxic damage.

title: Unnatural Eyes
description: Eyes change colour, glow, or become entirely alien.
effect: +10 to Awareness (Sight). Causes unease — -5 Fellowship.

title: Warped Frame
description: The skeleton warps, making the character taller, hunched, or bent.
effect: +5 Toughness, -5 Agility. Size may change by one step.

title: Warp Sense
description: The character gains an innate sense for warp disturbances.
effect: Gains the Psyniscience skill at Known (+0). May detect psychic phenomena within 20m.

title: Withered
description: Part of the body withers and desiccates, yet remains functional.
effect: -10 Strength. Gains Unnatural Toughness (+1).

title: Warp Instability
description: The character's connection to the warp deepens dangerously.
effect: Gains Psy Rating 1 (or +1 if already a psyker). Roll on Psychic Phenomena table once per session.
